arts.ttl: Man Utd sent Erik ten Hag sack demand midway through Tottenham fixture
arts.sum: Manchester United put in a horror first half display against Ange Postecoglou's side as Brennan Johnson tapped home from Mickey van de Ven's cross in the opening stages of the game

arts.sum: Erik ten Hag has endured a miserable start to his third season as Manchester United manager, a scenario Martin Keown saw coming as soon as he was handed a new contract

arts.ttl: Manchester United get Bruno Fernandes red card verdict as Gary Neville and pundit disagree

arts.ttl: Man Utd playing 'pub football': Neville savages Ten Hag in Spurs clash
arts.sum: Man Utd playing 'pub football': Neville savages Ten Hag in Spurs clash Tottenham were mostly comfortable throughout the half and things went from bad to worse for Man Utd when captain Bruno Fernandes got himself sent off.

arts.ttl: BREAKING: Bruno Fernandes slammed by Gary Neville as red card sums up Man Utd: 'An absolute disgrace'
arts.sum: Manchester United captain Bruno Fernandes was sent off just before half-time after his side endured a miserable opening period in their clash with Tottenham on Sunday

arts.ttl: Fernandes sent off as Manchester United trail Tottenham
arts.sum: Manchester United have endured a torrid first half against Tottenham in the Premier League. Erik ten Hag’s team were looking for a response after frustrating draws in consecutive campaigns but got off to a nightmare start when Spurs opened the scoring inside three minutes.
